channel.title: Artificial Intelligence on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Artificial Intelligence on MinWeb

item.title: Why AI Is Getting Dumber: The Crisis of Junk Data
item.description:
Have you ever asked an AI a question, only to get an answer that sounded confidently, hilariously wrong? Maybe it told you to put glue on your pizza to make the cheese stick, or suggested you eat a small rock every day for your health. Honestly, I’ve seen some models suggest things that would probably get you hospitalized.

If these blunders left you scratching your head, you aren’t alone. We are witnessing a strange, digital version of the “telephone game.” As AI models grow, they are running out of the high-quality, human-written information they need to learn. In their desperation to keep growing, they’ve started feeding on their own outputs, scrapings from the darkest corners of the internet, and recycled synthetic content.

item.title: Allbirds Pivots to AI: Stock Soars 300% After GPU Shift
item.description: Allbirds has stunned the market by ditching sustainable footwear to become a GPU-as-a-Service provider, resulting in a dramatic 300% surge in its stock price.

item.title: Iran Threatens to Destroy $30B Stargate AI Data Center
item.description: The $30 billion Stargate AI data center is now a geopolitical target after Iranian threats, raising critical questions about the future of global tech security.

item.title: Why OpenAI Is Shutting Down Sora: The Economics of Failure
item.description: OpenAI shuttered Sora due to unsustainable costs and poor revenue, proving that even revolutionary AI models must face the harsh reality of economic viability.
